---
title: "Water Risk"
---

## Dataset Reference

<table class="data-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Dataset</th>
      <th>Measurement</th>
      <th>Units</th>
      <th>Source</th>
      <th>Release Year</th>
      <th>Years of Data</th>
      <th>Coverage</th>
      <th>Resolution</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td></td>
      <td></td>
      <td></td>
      <td><a href="" target="_blank"></a></td>
      <td></td>
      <td></td>
      <td></td>
      <td></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

---

::: {.wiki-section}
## What Is It?

:::

::: {.wiki-section}
## Why Use It?

:::

::: {.wiki-section}
## How Is It Made?

:::

::: {.wiki-section}
## How Should We Interpret It?

:::

::: {.wiki-section}
## Source Data Citation

<div class="citation-block">
</div>
:::
